description_long: This is a classical-style sculpture of a standing male figure, partially draped in a cloth that covers his left shoulder and arm, with the rest of the body exposed. The figure leans casually against a vertical support, possibly a tree trunk or post, with his right arm resting atop it and his left hand placed on his hip. The sculpture is mounted on a rectangular plinth and shows signs of weathering, with patches of green moss or lichen on the surface, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. The figure wears a laurel wreath or headband, and his facial features are finely detailed, with curly hair and a serene expression. The overall posture is relaxed and naturalistic, reminiscent of Greco-Roman statuary. The surface is predominantly white stone, with visible discoloration and aging.
description: A weathered, classical-style male statue, partially draped and leaning against a support, with detailed facial features and a laurel wreath. The surface shows signs of moss and aging, mounted on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frontal details of the male figure, including the draped cloth, laurel wreath, and relaxed posture with the right arm resting on the support.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the draped cloth over the shoulder, and the depth of the support structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure, the draped cloth, and the support, with visible weathering and moss on the base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, the arm position, and the way the cloth falls over the back and shoulder.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be outdoors, likely in a park or garden setting, as indicated by the presence of moss and weathering.
